doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The 5-day notice rule under 735 ILCS 5/9-209 is real, but the Act was renamed the "Eviction Act" in 2017 and the email-service caveat and "conformed text" framing appear to be paraphrased or invented rather than authentic statutory language
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 78
REASON: The 5-day notice rule under 735 ILCS 5/9-209 is genuine, but the Act was renamed the "Eviction Act" in 2017, the email-service caveat appears invented, and this is a paraphrased "conformed text" rather than verifiable official statutory language.
